description: Using the Emoncms HTTP API and the API keys provided in '/home/ga/emoncms_apikeys.sh', set up a monitoring node named 'office_env' with three sensor channels: 'temperature', 'humidity', and 'co2'. Create and configure PHPFina feeds (engine 5, 10s interval) for each channel using the names 'office_env_temperature' (Unit: °C), 'office_env_humidity' (Unit: %), and 'office_env_co2' (Unit: ppm), all with the tag 'office_env'. Ensure the inputs are configured to log to these feeds. Verify the setup by posting two sets of data (Set 1: 21.5, 45.2, 620; Set 2: 22.1, 44.8, 635) and document the configuration, including feed IDs and the last recorded values, in a JSON file at '/home/ga/sensor_config.json'.
